---
title: "AnalysesForRevision"
author: "Ben Risk"
date: "2025-07-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
dat_harmonized = read.csv('dat_harmonized_lr.csv',stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
dat_harmonized$Family_ID=factor(dat_harmonized$Family_ID)

```


## Create a plot of Gestational Age and Chronological Age

```{r}
tiff('../Figures/GAvsChronologicalAge_Data_FirstSubmission.tiff',width=1280,height=640)
ggplot(dat_harmonized, aes(
    x = chor_age,
    y = GA,
    color = Scanner,
    shape = Sex   # add shape mapping
  )) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Chronological age (days)",
    y = "Gestational age at birth (weeks)",
    title = 'Data analyzed in first submission',
    color = "Scanner",
    shape = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") +
  xlim(0, NA) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17))  # e.g., 16 = filled circle, 17 = filled triangle
dev.off()


# Restricting analysis to 36 to 41:
dat_36_41 = dat_harmonized%>%filter(GA>=36 & GA<=41)
tiff('../Figures/GAvsChronologicalAgeCorrectedAge_Data_36_41.tiff',width=1280,height=640)
dat_36_41%>%ggplot(aes(x = chor_age, y = GA, color = Scanner, shape=Sex)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Chronological age (days)",
    y = "Gestational age at birth (weeks)",
    title='GA and chronological age of infant scans',
    color = "Scanner",
    shape = "Sex") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 24) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold")
  ) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Paired") +
  xlim(0,NA)+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17))  # e.g., 16 = filled circle, 17 = filled triangle
dev.off()

```




## Plot mean relative motion against Corr_age:

```{r}
library(mgcv)

#model.motion = gam(Mean_RMS~Sex+s(chor_age)+s(Unique_ID,bs='re')+s(Family_ID,bs='re'),data=dat_harmonized)
#summary(model.motion)

model.motion = gam(Mean_RMS~Sex+s(chor_age)+s(Unique_ID,bs='re')+s(Family_ID,bs='re'),data=dat_36_41)
summary(model.motion)

# check Absolute:
model.absolute = gam(Absolute_RMS~Sex+s(chor_age)+s(Unique_ID,bs='re')+s(Family_ID,bs='re'),data=dat_36_41)
summary(model.absolute)
# Absolute not significant. 


# Create a new data frame for predictions (averaging over random effects)
newdata <- data.frame(
  chor_age = seq(min(dat_36_41$chor_age, na.rm = TRUE),
                 max(dat_36_41$chor_age, na.rm = TRUE),
                 length.out = 200),
  Sex=factor('M',levels=levels(dat_36_41$Sex)),
  Unique_ID =dat_36_41$Unique_ID[1],
  Family_ID = dat_36_41$Family_ID[1]
)

# Predict fixed effect smooth of chor_age only
newdata$predicted <- predict(model.motion, newdata = newdata, exclude = c("s(Unique_ID)", "s(Family_ID)"))

# Plot data + fitted smooth
tiff('../Figures/RelativeMotion_ChronologicalAge_36_41.tiff',width=1280,height=640)
ggplot(dat_36_41, aes(x = chor_age, y = Mean_RMS)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 4) +
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x = chor_age, y = predicted), color = "blue", linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(
    x = "Chronological Age",
    y = "Relative Motion",
    title = "Relative motion vs. Chronological Age with GAM Fit"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 20) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"))
dev.off()

```

Conclusion: add Mean RMS to the models
